global_description: Streamlined fish with elongated body, covered in smooth, shiny scales. Predominantly silver with hints of green or blue, featuring dark spots along the sides. Fins are translucent with a slight pink or orange hue. The mouth is slightly pointed, and the eyes are small and round.
discriminative_attributes: Silver with green or blue hues
Translucent fins with pink or orange hue

part_details.body: Elongated, covered in smooth, shiny scales, silver with green or blue hues
part_details.fins: Translucent with slight pink or orange hue

spatial_relations: Fins positioned along sides and back
